productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Tan Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone loafers. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLeather upper for absolute comfort and styleSlip-on system for ease of wearConcealed elasticated gussets on the sides of the tongue for a customised FitFabric inner lining on the forefoot and padded leather inner lining on the midfoot for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsoleLeather footbed ergonomically curved for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs on the mid forefoot and mid heel for absolute grip on smooth surfacesXL Extralight sole for lightness strength and maximum comfortCurved midfoot and raised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
